creator: mueller6722@twc.com
text:
Created attachment 183022
Problem with "make" on/in ports tree as well as possible workarounds

On FreeBSD 11.0-STABLE and CURRENT, when PORTSDIR is other than /usr/ports, "make" finds the wrong MAKESYSPATH when it should be /usr/share/mk .  OK on src tree, haven't tested on doc tree when other than /usr/doc .

Previously, I had no particular problems related to ports tree on /BETA1/usr/ports.
